title: Rice Genomics: over the Past Two Decades and into the Future.
author: Song S Tian D Zhang Z Hu S Yu J
content: S-EPMC6411948 PMC6411948 Rice Genomics: over the Past Two Decades and into the Future. Domestic rice (Oryza sativa L.) is one of the most important cereal crops, feeding a large number of worldwide populations.
